title: Admin Eye init test: verify sudo pipe + encoding after startup
desc: After admin Eye init, verify that the sudo proxy works correctly: pipe file exists, UTF-8 encoding is set, and parallel accept workers are ready. Covers test-sudo-stdout-utf8.sh verification pattern.
steps: Check wkappbot_elevated pipe is listening: wkappbot --sudo eye tick should return within 5s after admin Eye startup.
Verify StandardOutputEncoding=UTF8 in ElevatedEyeProxy.cs: grep for 'StandardOutputEncoding.*UTF8' in Commands/ElevatedEyeProxy.cs -- must be present.
Run test-sudo-stdout-utf8.sh from repo root to confirm full integration: file grep + eye tick must both PASS with exit=0.
author: claude
